reasoning: The question asks if Elon Musk will cease to be CEO of Tesla in 2025. It is currently December 21, 2025. There are 10 days left in the year. A web search returned news stories directly referring to him as Tesla CEO as recently as December 20, 2025, and there is absolutely no news of him resigning, indicating he is still CEO. In fact, he recently received a massive new pay package specifically aimed at keeping him at Tesla, and he stated in May 2025 that he will only step down in the next five years if he dies. Since he is still alive and active, there is essentially no chance he will cease to be CEO in the remaining 10 days of 2025, barring extreme unforeseen circumstances like sudden death or a massive immediate scandal. Given the rules capping estimates at 0.02 and 0.98, I will submit 0.02.
